text: My office orders from here regularly. Golden Monkey is consistently amazing. Every time. Their Bai Sach Mon(crispy chicken and rice) is so good!! The pickled vegetables are the best I have ever had. Even their jerky is just so delicious. Very friendly staff. Consistently 10/10!
Best Cambodian food I’ve had here . 10/10 on all the dishes we ordered. The crab Rangoon was the best I’ve ever had in my life. The guy at the counter was friendly and patient with us.

We are a family of three with a wheelchair. We ordered the lort cha (stir-fried noodles), lok lak (shaken beef), and chicken wings (with delicious sauces) and we loved each of our dishes. It's located in a great location and a plenty of parking. We noticed that the there were more online and pickup orders than dining in, but man was the restaurant popping with customers. Customer service was top notch. Very kind owners. Food came out pretty quickly. I would definitely recommend this place!

Grew up in the Lynn area and was sad to see a lot of the Cambodian community assimilate and establishments disappear, Great to see a Cambodian restaurant thriving again in Lynn. The food was great. I had the beef lok lak and it was a little too salty for my taste. The service was good and the staff were friendly. I would recommend this place to anyone looking for a quick and tasty meal.

The food was delivered fresh! It’s my first time trying Golden Monkey Cafe and the food is already knocking the ball out of the park. The proportions are pretty big! It’s worth the price it’s at. The taste of the pad thai and fish sauce reminds me of home cooked food from grandmas house so it’s perfect to my liking.

I’ve had numerous dishes from The Golden Monkey Cafe and they never disappoint! Nowadays, there are fewer Cambodian restaurants in the area, so I make it a point to enjoy a delicious meal from here when I can. Every dish from here is a HIT! From the first bite, you can tell that this family owned spot puts their love and soul into every single dish. Their “Mekathang” AKA flat rice noodles are a family favorite.

author_name: Just a guy from the North shore
text: Great place... Place is super clean and I recommend this place to anyone. You can pick a dish without looking and still be satisfied with what you ordered...
Great food in a hole in the wall atmosphere. Huge portions that fill you up. The coconut coffee has real coconut in it!

Super friendly , helpful and down to earth . Let me try all the sauces to help me decide plus made a great suggestion on the beef and rice plate. (Bai loc lak) everything tasted great. Wings, egg rolls and the beef plate for $45 . Definitely worth it.
The food was AMAZING. just picked up some takeout. Will absolutely be returning. The staff was very welcoming!
Owner is a really nice guy 👍
very tasty and makes you feel at home
It’s bomb son word to muva
Never disappointed when I eat from here. :D
